commentary_text: The market assigns Germany a 56% win probability versus the model's 35%, a 21-percentage-point gap favoring the favorite. This sharpening of conviction could reflect recent form, injury status, or lineup changes that the model's last update did not capture. The model sees Ecuador as competitive, but real-money flows may be pricing in information about squad availability or recent performance that narrows the gap. The dashboard flags this divergence as a signal worth monitoring rather than evidence that either source has misprojudged the match.
